metadata.description: A two-skill pipeline for turning thin requirements into spec, and frozen specs into front-end code — anchored to your existing product instead of inventing new UX.

plugins.name: prd-to-spec
plugins.description: Distill a thin requirement / PRD into an executable SPEC, anchored to existing pages, fields, routes and components — no invented interactions.

plugins.name: spec-to-code
plugins.description: Turn a frozen SPEC into front-end code that reuses the host product's visual grammar, routing and component conventions.
